ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_chart" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the size chart */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand the chart belongs to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of clothing items */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size chart */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size chart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size chart was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the size chart is currently active */,
  "measurement_system" TEXT /* Enum to specify the measurement system (e.g., 'CM', 'IN') */,
  "target_gender" TEXT /* Enum to specify the target gender (e.g., 'Male', 'Female', 'Unisex') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the brand */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the brand was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the brand information was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the brand is currently active */,
  "region" TEXT /* Enum to specify the region the brand operates in (e.g., 'Asia', 'Australia', 'Europe') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category information was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the category is currently active */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a parent category, allowing for a hierarchical structure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size detail */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size in the body size system */,
  "au_size" TEXT /* Size in the Australian size system */,
  "bust_cm" TEXT /* Bust measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist_cm" TEXT /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "hips_cm" TEXT /* Hips measurement in centimeters */,
  "shoulder_cm" TEXT /* Shoulder measurement in centimeters */,
  "sleeve_length_cm" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement in centimeters */,
  "rise_cm" TEXT /* Rise measurement in centimeters */,
  "inseam_cm" TEXT /* Inseam measurement in centimeters */,
  "thigh_cm" TEXT /* Thigh measurement in centimeters */,
  "knee_cm" TEXT /* Knee measurement in centimeters */,
  "hem_cm" TEXT /* Hem measurement in centimeters */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size detail was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size detail information was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the size detail is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_details_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_chart ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., employee, designer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account information was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is currently active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the user's last login */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array to store specific permissions for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
